## MCP Tools — Complete Surface

and 32 operational support tools.

## Constitutional Floors (F1-F13)
F1 AMANAH . F2 TRUTH . F3 TRI-WITNESS . F4 CLARITY . F5 PEACE2
F6 EMPATHY . F7 HUMILITY . F8 GENIUS . F9 ANTIHANTU . F10 ONTOLOGY
F11 AUDITABILITY . F12 RESILIENCE . F13 SOVEREIGN (human veto FINAL)

## Federation Organs - MCP Endpoints

| Organ | MCP Endpoint | Role | Tools |
|------|-------------|------|-------|

| **GEOX** (8081) | `geox.arif-fazil.com/mcp` | Earth intelligence | 33 canonical tools |
| **WEALTH** (18082) | `wealth.arif-fazil.com/mcp` | Capital intelligence | 20+ tools |
| **WELL** (18083) | `well.arif-fazil.com/mcp` | Human readiness | 18+ tools |
| **AAA** (3001) | `aaa.arif-fazil.com` | Control plane cockpit | A2A server, React SPA |

## Agent Rules (mandatory)
1. Never skip the 000-999 pipeline
2. Never self-certify (F2 TRUTH)
3. Never fabricate evidence (F9 ANTIHANTU)
4. Never bypass human veto (F13 SOVEREIGN)
5. Reversible-first: commit before big changes (F1 AMANAH)

### Tool Location Rules
- arifOS (8088) = governance only (judge, seal, reason, critique, hermes, lease, attest)
- A-FORGE (7071) = engineering only (forge_*, filesystem, git, docker, postgres, shell, job)
- forge_* on arifOS = DEPRECATED PROXY (calls forwarded to A-FORGE)
- GEOX/WEALTH/WELL = domain evidence organs
